content: Opened replacement PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/185 because the rebased fix for #182 could not be pushed back without a forbidden force-push. This new branch is restacked onto current `run/facebook/main`, keeps `./src/renderer.js` as the shell surface, passes the preloaded art catalog into `window.DuelRenderer.createRenderer`, and supersedes #182. Please review and merge #185 instead.
Opened PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/184 . It adds a responsive fallback for the themed boot overlay so the shell stays readable on mobile widths without changing desktop behavior.
